message:
Add conformance fixtures for shape manipulation primitives

Add ProgramSpec/FixtureProgram variants and fixture cases for:
- Reshape: [6]→[2,3] and [6]→[3,2] (3 cases)
- Slice: extract [1:4] from 5-element vector (2 cases)
- Transpose: reverse axes of [2,3] tensor (2 cases, i64 + f64)
- Rev: reverse along axis 0 (2 cases)
- Squeeze: remove size-1 leading dimension (2 cases)
- Concatenate: join two vectors along axis 0 (2 cases)

Lax family: 306 cases. Full parity: 559 total (534 transform + 25 RNG),
100% pass, gate=pass. Parity report and RaptorQ sidecar regenerated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
